steps.title: Use the right triangle
steps.content: The rectangle's diagonal is the hypotenuse of a right triangle. Let $b$ be the longer side. The shorter side is $4$, and the hypotenuse is $4\sqrt{17}$.

steps.title: Solve for the side
steps.content: Subtract $16$ and take the positive square root: $$ b^2=256 $$ $$ b=16 $$ The answer is 16.
